Description: Estimated daily trading volume based on news count chart image analysis.

Estimated daily trading volume based on direct volume chart image analysis.
Predicted ratio of future to current volume using news count chart image analysis.

Predicted ratio of future to current volume using price-volume average 20-day chart image.
